name: tracing-jawline
prompt: Extreme close-up of a feminine thumb tracing along the jawline of a silver-haired girl in a glossy photograph. Heat marks from fingertips visible on the photo surface. The photograph shows a composed face with ice-blue eyes. Warm amber lighting on thumb and photo. Intimate obsessive gesture. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: shes-mine
prompt: Close-up of young woman with deep red wavy disheveled hair. Wearing ONLY a white shirt messily rebuttoned, no blazer, no jacket. Expression broken — green eyes wet with tears, lips barely parted and trembling. Not fury anymore, not calculation. Raw unguarded anguish. Warm amber lighting catching tears on cheeks. Heat shimmer faint around her. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
bubble: Speech from Senna, face fills frame CENTER, place bubble BOTTOM as whispered broken words

name: alone-at-vanity
prompt: Wide shot, high angle looking down. Young woman with deep red wavy hair wearing ONLY a white shirt messily rebuttoned, no blazer, no jacket, sitting small at a wooden vanity in a dormitory bedroom. Drawer open, glossy photograph of a silver-haired girl in one hand. Fogged mirror reflecting nothing clear. Unmade bed to the right. Room filled with fading heat shimmer. Warm amber lighting from bedside lamp. Single isolated figure. Night scene. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
